hero.descripcion: We don't build ordinary websites. We design and develop custom digital systems to automate your bookings, manage clients, and streamline your operations 24/7.

features.descripcion: We transform real operations with automation, reliability, and premium technical support.
features.card_1_desc: Systems built from the ground up to grow without downtime: from 100 to 100,000 users.
features.card_2_desc: Bookings, payments, and auto notifications: less chaos, more revenue 24/7.
features.card_3_desc: Redundancy + auto backups. If something goes down, we fix it in under 4 hours.
features.card_4_desc: Priority technical response with clear SLAs and constant updates.

products.veterinaria_desc: Digital clinical records, vaccination tracking, and scheduled appointments with owner notifications.
products.crm_desc: Client portfolio management, sales funnel, and commercial tracking in a single console.
products.cta_personalizado: Need something more specific? We also develop custom systems for other types of businesses.

casestudies.heading: REAL RESULTS
casestudies.case_1_desc: We eliminated WhatsApp booking friction with a 24/7 system. The client recovered 15 weekly hours of manual management.
casestudies.case_2_desc: Migration to an optimized B2B platform with real-time stock sync and interactive digital catalog.
casestudies.case_3_desc: Implementation of automatic WhatsApp reminders and a unified control panel for receptionists and doctors.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q_1: Do I have to pay monthly maintenance?
faq.a_1: It depends on the plan you choose. We offer one-time payment options for informational sites, and subscription options for complex systems that require databases, updates, and ongoing technical support.
faq.q_2: Do I own the code and the website?
faq.a_2: Yes. Unlike closed platforms like Shopify or Wix, we build custom solutions. If you decide to migrate in the future, the website is 100% yours.
faq.q_3: How long does a project take?
faq.a_3: A premium landing page like this one is usually ready in 5 to 7 business days. More complex systems with an admin panel take between 2 and 3 weeks.
faq.q_4: Do you handle the domain and hosting?
faq.a_4: Yes, we handle all the technical aspects. We advise you on setting up your domain (.com or .com.ar) and host your site on ultra-fast global servers.

calculador.heading: How much does it cost NOT to automate?
calculador.descripcion: Discover how many hours and how much money you can recover by delegating operational tasks to your digital employee.
calculador.horas_desc: Estimated time spent on manual chats, scheduling appointments, and managing spreadsheets.
calculador.valor_desc: Cost of your work hour or the proportional salary of your operational staff.
calculador.roi_texto: Recover the system cost +{{pct}}% per year.
calculador.nota: *Estimated calculation over 52 weeks per year. Compares the cost of your time against the one-time cost of ExeSistemasWEB's most complete automation system.

audit.heading: FREE AUTOMATION AUDIT
audit.descripcion: Answer 3 quick questions and our AI engine will analyze your business to suggest the key processes you should put on autopilot.
audit.q_1_titulo: What industry or sector is your business in?
audit.q_1_op_2: Health, Beauty or Aesthetics (Clinic, Hair Salon, Spa)
audit.q_2_titulo: Where does your team waste the most time daily?
audit.q_2_op_3: Reconciling payments and sending quotes manually
audit.q_3_titulo: How do your clients mainly contact you?
audit.email_titulo: Analysis ready! Where should we send the report?
audit.email_desc: Enter your email to process your audit and unlock the diagnosis on screen.
audit.que_sigue_desc: Your full report has been pre-generated. Schedule a 15-minute technical session to see how to integrate it.
audit.report_default_desc: Your business has excellent growth potential but is held back by manual processes.
audit.report_default_recomendacion: A comprehensive web system with database.
audit.report_soporte_desc: Your clients demand immediate answers. Responding manually makes you lose sales after hours.
audit.report_soporte_recomendacion: Integrate an AI Chatbot trained with your catalog and FAQs, connected directly to WhatsApp API or web.
audit.report_turnos_desc: The back and forth to coordinate a day and time wastes hours of inefficient administration.
audit.report_turnos_recomendacion: A dynamic self-manageable online booking portal with integrated payment gateway for reservation deposits.
audit.report_pagos_desc: Manual bank transfer reconciliation slows down your billing and cash flow.
audit.report_pagos_recomendacion: Integrated checkout system with Mercado Pago/PayPal that records payments in Supabase and auto-generates confirmations.
audit.report_stock_desc: Lack of synchronization in inventory or order status causes delays and customer complaints.
audit.report_stock_recomendacion: A private admin Control Panel (Dashboard) connected in real-time with alerts and notifications.
